facebook.caption: 1,490 reviews. Every single one a 5-star. That's not luck, that's Onbird Phu Quoc. This tour agency in Cửa Lấp runs boat trips, snorkeling, and island-hopping that locals actually rate. No inflated packages. No herding tourists onto crowded decks. Just a crew that shows up and delivers. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
